name: @launchdarkly/agent-skills-evals
description: LLM eval suite for LaunchDarkly agent skills and gram function tools

scripts.eval: promptfoo eval --config evals/metrics/metric-create.eval.yaml --config evals/metrics/metric-choose.eval.yaml --config evals/metrics/metric-instrument.eval.yaml --config evals/feature-flags/flag-create.eval.yaml --config evals/feature-flags/flag-targeting.eval.yaml --config evals/feature-flags/flag-cleanup.eval.yaml --config evals/feature-flags/flag-discovery.eval.yaml --config evals/ai-configs/aiconfig-create.eval.yaml --config evals/ai-configs/aiconfig-update.eval.yaml --config evals/ai-configs/aiconfig-targeting.eval.yaml --config evals/ai-configs/aiconfig-variations.eval.yaml --config evals/ai-configs/aiconfig-tools.eval.yaml --config evals/ai-configs/aiconfig-online-evals.eval.yaml --config evals/ai-configs/aiconfig-projects.eval.yaml
